title.en: Oyarzabal scores twice as Spain cruise past Austria
title.zh-CN: Oyarzabal的得分是西班牙巡航经过奥地利的两倍

summary.en: Mikel Oyarzabal scores in each half to help Spain beat Austria 3-0 in their World Cup last-32 match in Los Angeles.
summary.zh-CN: 米克尔·奥亚尔扎巴尔（ Mikel Oyarzabal ）在每半场比赛中得分，帮助西班牙在洛杉矶举行的世界杯最后32场比赛中以3-0击败奥地利

title.en: 'We want to win World Cup for him' - Portugal carry Jota's memory
title.zh-CN: “我们想为他赢得世界杯” -葡萄牙承载着乔塔的记忆

summary.en: One year after his death, Portugal are using Diogo Jota's memory to help inspire them at the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 在他去世一年后，葡萄牙正在利用Diogo Jota的记忆来帮助他们在2026年世界杯上获得灵感。

title.en: England have 'big concerns' - so who would you pick to face Mexico?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰有“重大担忧” -那么你会选择谁来面对墨西哥？

summary.en: Who should play at right-back? Does Anthony Gordon deserve to start? Select and share your England team to face Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 谁应该打右后卫？安东尼·戈登（ Anthony Gordon ）是否应该开始？选择并分享您的英格兰队面对墨西哥。

title.en: 16.3m tune in to watch England beat DR Congo
title.zh-CN: 1630万观看英格兰击败刚果民主共和国

summary.en: England's dramatic win over DR Congo in the World Cup last 16 attracts an audience of 16.3m on the BBC.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队在过去16届世界杯上戏剧性地战胜刚果民主共和国，在英国广播公司吸引了1630万观众。

title.en: 'He's been really good' - Oyarzabal nets twice for Spain
title.zh-CN: “他一直都很棒” - Oyarzabal为西班牙打了两次网

summary.en: Mikel Oyarzabal scores twice for Spain as they beat Austria 3-0 in Los Angeles to advance to the last 16.
summary.zh-CN: 米克尔·奥亚尔扎巴尔（ Mikel Oyarzabal ）在洛杉矶以3比0击败奥地利队，晋级16强，西班牙队得分两次。

title.en: Where to watch the World Cup on the BBC and ITV
title.zh-CN: 在英国广播公司和独立电视台观看世界杯的地方

summary.en: All the TV and radio details for each of the 2026 World Cup knockout games.
summary.zh-CN: 2026年世界杯淘汰赛每场比赛的所有电视和广播细节。

title.en: The World Cup's free agents looking for their next move
title.zh-CN: 世界杯的自由球员正在寻找下一步行动

summary.en: Fourteen players still at the World Cup have no club to return to once the tournament is over.
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯结束后，仍有14名球员没有俱乐部可以回归。

title.en: Gueye quits Senegal until coaching staff replaced
title.zh-CN: Gueye退出塞内加尔，直到教练组人员被替换

summary.en: Senegal midfielder Pape Gueye says he will be "taking a break" from playing for his country while the current management is in charge.
summary.zh-CN: 塞内加尔中场球员Pape Gueye表示，在现任管理层执教期间，他将“休息”为国家队效力。

title.en: McInnes biggest factor in McCrorie's Rangers return
title.zh-CN: 麦金尼斯麦克罗伊游骑兵队回归的最大因素

summary.en: Ross McCrorie is adamant Derek McInnes has the qualities to be a success at Rangers, saying the manager was the number one reason he turned down offers to remain in England for a return to Ibrox.
summary.zh-CN: Ross McCrorie坚持认为Derek McInnes有资格在流浪者队取得成功，并表示经理是他拒绝留在英格兰重返Ibrox的首要原因。

title.en: 'You can't catch your breath' - how will Azteca altitude impact England?
title.zh-CN: “你喘不过气来” -阿兹特克海拔将如何影响英格兰？

summary.en: BBC Sport explores how playing football at high altitude affects the body and mind as England prepare to visit Mexico and their fortress Azteca Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）探讨了英格兰准备访问墨西哥及其堡垒阿兹特克体育场（ Azteca Stadium ）时，高海拔踢足球如何影响身心。

title.en: Goalscorer Balogun sent off for USA

summary.en: USA forward Folarin Balogun is shown a straight red card for a challenge on Bosnia-Herzegovina's Tarik Muharemovic during their World Cup match.
summary.zh-CN: 美国前锋Folarin Balogun在世界杯比赛中为波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的Tarik Muharemovic出示了一张红牌。

title.en: Balogun gives USA deserved lead over Bosnia
title.zh-CN: Balogun让美国在波斯尼亚获得应有的领先优势

summary.en: Folarin Balogun gives the USA the lead against Bosnia-Herzegovina in their round of 32 match at the San Francisco Bay Area Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: Folarin Balogun在旧金山湾区体育场举行的32轮比赛中领先美国对阵波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那。

title.en: First Afcon, now World Cup - Senegal trapped in 'football hell'
title.zh-CN: 第一届Afcon ，现在是世界杯-塞内加尔陷入“足球地狱”

summary.en: Senegal's nightmarish year continues, with a heart-breaking collapse against Belgium featuring late penalty drama which was remarkably similar to events in this year's chaotic Afcon final.
summary.zh-CN: 塞内加尔的噩梦般的一年仍在继续，对比利时的令人心碎的崩溃，其中包括晚期的惩罚戏剧，这与今年混乱的Afcon决赛中的事件非常相似。

title.en: 'I spent $6,000 on a World Cup trip but was left stranded at the gate'
title.zh-CN: “我花了$ 6,000在世界杯之旅，但被困在大门口”

summary.en: Hundreds of fans who bought World Cup tickets on resale site StubHub say they have had them cancelled at the last minute.
summary.zh-CN: 在转售网站StubHub上购买世界杯门票的数百名球迷表示，他们在最后一刻取消了门票。

title.en: Why did England struggle against DR Congo - and what can they learn?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰为什么要与刚果民主共和国作斗争-他们能学到什么？

summary.en: A tactical analysis of England's victory over DR Congo - and what it might teach them for their next World Cup match against Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 对英格兰战胜刚果民主共和国的战术分析-以及它可能会教会他们下一场对阵墨西哥的世界杯比赛。

title.en: London City Lionesses sign Germany striker Anyomi

summary.en: Germany forward Nicole Anyomi joins London City Lionesses on a four-year contract.

summary.en: Spain eased into the round of 16 of the World Cup with a comfortable 3-0 win over Austria in Los Angeles.
